cheese_varieties_types.label: Cheese Varieties and Types Produced
cheese_varieties_types.help: List all cheese varieties and types produced (e.g., fresh, aged, semi-hard, blue cheese).

annual_production_quantity.label: Annual Production Quantity
annual_production_quantity.help: Specify the quantity produced per year. If multiple types are produced, indicate quantities per type.

flagship_cheese.label: Flagship Cheese
flagship_cheese.help: Indicate the cheese that best represents the identity of your farm or production.

product_characteristics.label: Product Characteristics
product_characteristics.help: Indicate any special characteristics: organic, biodynamic (with or without certification), or other notable features.

herd_size_and_breed.label: Herd Size and Breed
herd_size_and_breed.help: Indicate the number of animals and the breed(s) involved in milk production.

adult_animal_feed.label: Adult Animal Feed
adult_animal_feed.help: Describe the feed provided to adult animals (type, origin, percentage of own-produced vs. purchased feed).

young_animal_feed.label: Young Animal Feed
young_animal_feed.help: Describe the feed provided to young animals (calves, kids, lambs).

farming_system.label: Farming System
farming_system.help: Specify the farming system used (e.g., tethered, free-range, semi-free-range).

dry_period.label: Dry Period
dry_period.help: Indicate the dry period duration and management practices.

barn_size_and_type.label: Barn Size and Type
barn_size_and_type.help: Describe the size and type of barn or housing facility used.

fixed_housing.label: Fixed Housing (Tie-Stall System)
fixed_housing.help: Indicate whether animals are kept in fixed tie-stall housing (Yes/No).

daily_grazing.label: Daily Grazing or Other Outdoor Access
daily_grazing.help: Describe grazing practices or any other form of daily outdoor access for animals.

disease_management.label: Disease Management
disease_management.help: Describe the approach to disease treatment (e.g., conventional pharmacology, homeopathy, other).

veterinary_advisory.label: Veterinary Advisory
veterinary_advisory.help: Indicate whether a veterinarian is consulted regularly and in what capacity.

vaccinations.label: Vaccinations
vaccinations.help: Indicate whether vaccinations are administered (Yes/No) and specify which ones.

milking_method.label: Milking Method
milking_method.help: Describe the milking method used (e.g., hand milking, mechanical milking, robotic milking).

milk_production_volume.label: Milk Production Volume
milk_production_volume.help: Indicate daily or annual milk production volume.

external_milk_purchase.label: External Milk Purchase
external_milk_purchase.help: Indicate whether milk is purchased from external sources, and if so, specify quantity, origin, and supplier.

coagulation_method.label: Coagulation Method
coagulation_method.help: Describe the coagulation method used (e.g., animal rennet, vegetable rennet, microbial rennet, acid coagulation).

starter_culture_type.label: Starter Culture Type
starter_culture_type.help: Specify the type of whey or starter culture used (e.g., natural whey starter, commercial cultures).

ripening.label: Ripening
ripening.help: Describe the ripening process, including duration and conditions.

affinage_methods_and_locations.label: Affinage Methods and Locations
affinage_methods_and_locations.help: Describe the aging/affinage methods and the locations where aging takes place.

preservatives_additives.label: Preservatives and Additives
preservatives_additives.help: Specify any preservatives or additives used, including type, quantity, and origin.

moulds_yeasts.label: Moulds and Yeasts
moulds_yeasts.help: Specify any moulds or yeasts used, including type, quantity, and origin.

distance_production_to_storage.label: Distance from Production to Storage Site
distance_production_to_storage.help: Indicate the distance between the production site and the storage or aging facility.

packaging_location_and_method.label: Packaging Location and Method
packaging_location_and_method.help: Describe where and how the cheese is packaged.

available_packaging_types.label: Available Packaging Types
available_packaging_types.help: List the packaging formats available (e.g., vacuum-sealed, wax-wrapped, whole wheel).

sales_channels.label: Sales Channels
sales_channels.help: Describe where and how the cheese is sold (e.g., on-farm, local shops, supermarkets, online).

source_price_per_kg.label: Source Price per kg
source_price_per_kg.help: Indicate the source price per kg. Specify whether the price includes or excludes VAT.

average_package_price.label: Average Package Price
average_package_price.help: Indicate the average retail price per package.

environmental_conditions.label: Environmental Conditions at Production Site
environmental_conditions.help: Describe the environmental conditions of the production area, including any known environmental risks.

laboratory_analysis.label: Laboratory Analysis
laboratory_analysis.help: Indicate whether laboratory analyses are carried out and by which laboratory.

certification_bodies.label: Certification Bodies
certification_bodies.help: Specify any certification bodies involved (e.g., organic, PDO, PGI, biodynamic).

other_notes.label: Other Notes
other_notes.help: Any additional information relevant to the product or production process.
